title: Substrate impl declaration
description: Formal schema for a substrate impl provision per D12 (substrate kind) + D17 (capability vocabulary refinement). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity is out of scope per D28; handled by the framework conformance validator (D30 + D32).

id.description: Stable substrate identifier (D12). Vocabulary-identifier per D34.

version.description: Substrate version (D12). Range-comparable for binding resolution per D33.

capabilities.description: Interfaces the substrate exposes for other extensions to hook into (D12). Hybrid vocabulary per D17: core abstract capabilities (hooks, skills, event-chain) + extension-registered (fully-qualified per D29). A substrate without capabilities is meaningless.

runtime-shapes.description: Interaction modes the substrate supports (D12). Core values + extension-registered. Must declare at least one.
